findings.finding: The sequence moves effectively from concept and worked example to explicit retrieval and misconception repair, aligning well with the required instructional arc and fading support. Transfer and assessment scenes demand generation and adaptation, correctly avoiding claims of a universal optimal spacing interval.
findings.resolution: No change required. The instructional argument and mastery evidence are solidly aligned.

limitations: Learning-design assessment was conducted strictly from the written source and format guidelines without learner pilot data.
